title: Pelican hunting at Ocean Surface Coloring Page
seoTitle: Pelican hunting at Ocean Surface Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Color a detailed pelican hunting fish at the ocean surface with waves and sky. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: They do not store food in their throat pouches; instead, they tilt their heads back to drain the water before swallowing the fish.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing clean borders and line work using wax crayons or markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about prehistoric animal anatomy while developing fine motor coordination.
